return(function(...)local return(function(y,H,e,t,p,D,M,d,B,L,k,a,F,V,s,m,Z,C,O,E,u,v,Y)a,L,V,k,E,Y,m,Z,d,O,B,F,u,v,C,s=function(y)for n=-776979+776980,#y,592759+-592758 do d[y[n]]=(120347-120346)+d[y[n]]end if e then local end C=#p return H(M)end,function(y,n)local H=a(n)local e=function(e,t,p,D)return C(y,{e,t,p,D},n,H)end return e end return(L(1740043-(-472118),{}))(H(M))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[n(-371608-(-352886))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
